name: Spaghetti with Caramelized Onions, Anchovies
recipeIngredient: 2 Large Spanish onions, cut into eighths
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12 to 14-inch saute pan, place 3 tablespoons oil and onions over medium heat.
2. Cook slowly until medium golden brown, about 20 to 25 minutes. Set aside.
3. Bring 6 quarts water to boil and add 2 tablespoons salt.
4. Clean and gut anchovies. Remove fillets. In another 12 to 14-inch saute pan, heat remaining oil until smoking.
5. Add anchovies, chili flakes, and garlic. Cook until fish has broken down, about 4 to 5 minutes.
6. Add onions to the anchovy mixture and simmer.
7. Drop spaghetti into boiling water. Cook according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and toss in the pan with the anchovy mixture.
8. Add parsley and stir to coat. Pour into a warmed serving bowl, sprinkle with bread crumbs, and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
